case_title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. THE 180 RESTAURANT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE TO TEN
COMPUTATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE 180 RESTAURANT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GARCIA, PAUL INDIVIDUALLY GARCIA, ERIK JAMES INDIVIDUALLY $4,138.30 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $381.48 INTEREST, $322.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,592.28, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Final Account, Final Report, Approving Receiver'S Fees And Costs, Discharging Receiver And Exonerate Surety
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Matter on calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010. No appearance by either party, tentative ruling adoptive as follows: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion For Approval Of Final Account, Final Report, And For Approval Of Receiver's Fees And Costs, And To Discharge Receiver And Exonerate Surety is granted. No opposition has been filed. Attorney's fees for the motion are awarded in the amount of $300. Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr., not reported (612).

Mo For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Coles As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
